steps.title: Focus on the requested difference
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between Water Line and Seven Earth Mountain. The notes show different materials: aluminum tubing for one installation and soil for the other.

steps.title: Prefer a direct contrast
steps.content: Choice A and choice B mention only Water Line, so they cannot contrast the two works. Choice D groups both as installation art. The sentence that uses by contrast and names both materials fits the goal. The answer is C.
